compositional_truth_check.p4_silver_guest: Systemic Loss (No evidence of silver guest)
compositional_truth_check.new_introductions: Eggshell fragments observed in P3/P4 soil surface

vision_report.inventory_reconciliation: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding P2 and P4. The black pot containing the rabbit (P3) shows a single Pothos leaf and a necrotic, shriveled leaf remnant. P2/P4 (the lower black pot) contains only a single, struggling, elongated sprout of unknown origin, not the registered species.

plant_audit.p1: Stable, succulent foliage visible in yellow pot.
plant_audit.p2_p4_cluster: Failed. The expected species are absent. Only a single, etiolated sprout remains in the lower pot.
plant_audit.p3: Pothos specimen is in a state of decline; one healthy-ish leaf, one necrotic leaf.

biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of eggshell fragments in the lower pot, likely an attempt at calcium supplementation or soil amendment.
biome_observations.surface_growth: No moss or secondary weeds detected; soil appears sterile/low-activity.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t5: Minimal change; necrotic leaf in P3 remains static.
temporal_deltas.t5_to_t3: Pothos leaf in P3 shows slight postural drooping.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_current: The sprout in the lower pot has become more vertical but remains etiolated (pale/stretched), indicating insufficient light despite the LED source.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of 'Stagnant Decline'. The lack of robust growth and the presence of necrotic tissue suggest poor root health or chronic over-watering. The 'Silver Guest' and 'Mexican Mint' are effectively lost.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is struggling. The Pothos (P3) is the only recognizable survivor of the original registry, though it is clearly stressed. The lower pot, intended for the Mexican Mint and Silver Guest, has been repurposed or colonized by a single, weak sprout of unknown origin. The presence of eggshells suggests an amateur attempt to revive the soil, which has not yet yielded positive results.
